message:
feat(tools): refactor reservation conflict format for Python parity and add suspicious reservation detection

Reservation system improvements:
- reservations.rs (+208 lines): refactor ConflictHolder struct to
  match Python reference format (agent/path_pattern/exclusive fields
  instead of agent_name/reservation_id), add detect_suspicious_file_
  reservation() validation function matching Python behavior for
  detecting overly broad or dangerous reservation patterns
- reservation_index.rs (+50 lines): indexing refinements for faster
  conflict detection lookups
- resources.rs (+66 lines): resource handling updates for new
  reservation format

Code quality:
- messaging.rs (+80 lines): formatting/reorganization breaking long
  resolve_agent() calls across multiple lines for readability
- build_slots.rs, lib.rs, products.rs: minor adjustments

Testing:
- tests/reservation_error_parity.rs: new parity test validating that
  reservation error messages and conflict structures match the Python
  reference implementation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -224,9 +224,9 @@ pub(crate) mod tool_util {
 
     /// Placeholder patterns that indicate unconfigured hooks/settings.
     const PLACEHOLDER_PATTERNS: &[&str] = &[
-        "YOUR_PROJECT",
         "YOUR_PROJECT_PATH",
         "YOUR_PROJECT_KEY",
+        "YOUR_PROJECT",
         "PLACEHOLDER",
         "<PROJECT>",
         "{PROJECT}",
